metadata.title: Folder by tags distributor
metadata.description: Folder by tags distributor Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use tags specifies in 'tags' property of markdown file for distribution between folders
ast.target: 使用 markdown 文件的 'tags' 属性中指定的标签在文件夹之间分配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use tags specified inside note content for distribution between folders
ast.target: 使用笔记内容中指定的标签在文件夹之间分配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, plugin will distribute notes between folders until all tags used. By enabling this setting tag order will matter. For example, tags 'book, science' will not be placed to 'Science/Book' directory hierarchy. It means only 'Book/Science' structure will work.
ast.target: 默认情况下，插件会将笔记分配到文件夹，直到使用所有标签。启用此设置后，标签顺序将很重要。例如，标签 'book, science' 不会被放置到 'Science/Book' 目录层次结构中。这意味着只有 'Book/Science' 结构有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, plugin treat tags of nested ('science/book') format as separate tags ('science' and 'book'). Disable this setting to apply tag name transformation to folder name as it is: 'science/book' => 'Science/book'
ast.target: 默认情况下，插件将嵌套格式（'science/book'）的标签视为单独的标签（'science' 和 'book'）。禁用此设置可将标签名称原样转换为文件夹名称：'science/book' => 'Science/book'

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can specify folder name to put notes that has no more path. Plugin will look for this name in each folder. In case specified name exist, plugin put notes that does not match over there. Make field empty to disable this option.
ast.target: 您可以指定文件夹名称来放置没有更多路径的笔记。插件将在每个文件夹中查找此名称。如果指定的名称存在，插件会将不匹配的笔记放在那里。将字段留空以禁用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a folder to exclude notes from being moved by plugin
ast.target: 添加一个文件夹以排除笔记不被插件移动

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use frontmatter tags for folder resolver
ast.target: 使用前置标签进行文件夹解析

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use content tags for folder resolver
ast.target: 使用内容标签进行文件夹解析

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Force sequential tag to directory structure
ast.target: 强制按顺序将标签映射到目录结构

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Treat nested tags as separate tags
ast.target: 将嵌套标签视为单独标签

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folder name to place other notes
ast.target: 放置其他笔记的文件夹名称

ast.name: name
ast.source: Redistribute all notes to folder by tags
ast.target: 按标签将所有笔记重新分配到文件夹
